note: Internal sanity only (build green, matrix covered). This is NOT verification (invariant I4) - a separate agent independently verifies.

checks.result: PASS, full package suite green, no regressions (ok, 10.127s)

validation_matrix_coverage.AC7-compacted-only-design: covered (signature inspection: GraphNeighbors(g *CSRGraph, ...) - no EdgeLog parameter)

design_note_discovered_during_implementa: The type filter prunes traversal itself (edges of a non-matching type are never followed), not just the final result set - a node reachable only through a non-matching intermediate edge is unreachable under that filter. This was surfaced by an initial test-fixture mismatch (a 2-hop LLM_ASSERTED-only target reachable solely via an EdgeEntityCooccur hop-1 edge returned empty under an EdgeLLMAsserted filter) and is now explicitly documented in traverse.go's GraphNeighbors doc comment and exercised directly by TestGraphNeighbors/TypeFilterSingleType and /LargeGraphExceedsCapWithin2Hops.
